title: Remove, inspect, repair and refit motorcycle tyres and tubes
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, inspect, repair and refit motorcycle tyres and tubes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove, repair and refit motorcycle tyres and tubes

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Tyre and tube removal, inspection, repair and refitting information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Tyre and tube removal, inspection, repair and refitting information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Tyre and tube removal, inspection, repair and refitting information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove, repair and refit motorcycle tyres and tubes

elements.title: Remove and inspect tyres, tubes and wheels

pcs.text: Tyres and tubes are removed from wheels according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Tyres, tubes and wheels are inspected according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Inspection findings and recommendations for necessary repairs are reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tyres and tubes are removed from wheels according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Tyres, tubes and wheels are inspected according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Inspection findings and recommendations for necessary repairs are reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tyres and tubes are removed from wheels according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Tyres, tubes and wheels are inspected according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Inspection findings and recommendations for necessary repairs are reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove and inspect tyres, tubes and wheels

elements.title: Repair and refit tyres and tubes

pcs.text: Repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.2 Tyres and tubes are repaired according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Tyre is mounted to wheel according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Assembled wheel and tyre are checked for serviceability and correct assembly, and wheel assembly is inflated according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.2 Tyres and tubes are repaired according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Tyre is mounted to wheel according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Assembled wheel and tyre are checked for serviceability and correct assembly, and wheel assembly is inflated according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.2 Tyres and tubes are repaired according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Tyre is mounted to wheel according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Assembled wheel and tyre are checked for serviceability and correct assembly, and wheel assembly is inflated according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Repair and refit tyres and tubes

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and wheel assembly is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and wheel assembly is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and wheel assembly is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
